[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / exp

# Method: exp()

```ts
exp(value): number;
```

Calculate Euler's number raised to a value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Exponent for Euler's number. |

## Returns

`number`

Exponential value.

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="exp" encoded-code="-IDAuNyA_-" />
